title: Shield Sound Fixes
body:
# Shield Fixes

## THIS MOD IS OUTDATED -> NEWER VERSION: [https://modrinth.com/mod/complete-shield-fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/complete-shield-fixes)

 + Fixes MC-105068 -- https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-105068

+ MC-105068 is a minecraft bug where when another player hits a player blocking with a shield, they hear the default hurt sound instead of the block sound. This also means shield disable sounds don’t play. However this mods fixes this by adding the following:

+ Adds Shield disable sounds

 + Adds Shield block sounds for  explosions, arrows, normal hitting etc

 + Even plays shield sounds from other player's shield
